channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-15
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen significant progress across multiple projects. Notably, the 'metacheck' and 'regcheck' projects have made substantial updates, with 'metacheck' replacing `devtools::install_github` with `pak::pkg_install` and 'regcheck' enhancing its report viewing experience and UI flow. Meanwhile, 'docpluck' has released version 2.4.88, addressing various issues and improving its functionality. It's exciting to see these projects intersect, such as the "working version of Regcheck" committed to 'metacheck', highlighting the connections between our community's efforts. Overall, these updates demonstrate the community's dedication to improving research tools and we look forward to seeing the continued impact of these projects.

75 commits across 5 active repositories this week.

Most active:

metacheck28 commits
regcheck18 commits
docpluck16 commits
coarse12 commits
auto-zcurve1 commits

item.title: metacheck: 5 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The 'dev' branch saw changes with the replacement of `devtools::install_github` with `pak::pkg_install` by nielsvanberkel. The 'prereg_regcheck' branch had a "name fix" committed by Lakens, as well as a "working version of Regcheck" also committed by Lakens. The 'main' branch was updated by merging the 'dev' branch into it, and then the updated 'main' branch was merged into the 'dev' branch by Lisa DeBruine. The 'main' branch was also updated by merging pull request #310 from nielsvanberkel's 'main' branch by Lisa DeBruine.

5 commit(s) today:

  • 9d012e7 [dev] Merge pull request #310 from nielsvanberkel/main — Lisa DeBruine
  • 8a605a3 [dev] Merge branch 'dev' into main — Lisa DeBruine

View all commits →

item.title: docpluck: 1 commit today
item.description:
giladfeldman/docpluck

The main branch was the focus of the recent work, with several commits made to it. A test was added to assert that the audit input PDF is byte-equal to the pinned feed, as stated in the commit message "test(canary): assert audit input PDF byte-equal to pinned feed (R-0003)". The documentation was updated to mark the v2.4.88 release as shipped, including a tag, PyPI, app pin, and verification on Railway and Vercel, as noted in the commit "docs(todo): mark v2.4.88 release shipped (tag + PyPI + app pin + Railway/Vercel verified)". Fixes were made to address issues in versions v2.4.86, v2.4.87, and v2.4.88, including adjustments to ScienceArena re-audit, span x-gap spacing, and camelot Windows table fix, as described in the commit "fix(v2.4.86/87/88): ScienceArena re-audit — span x-gap spacing, F0 body-from-text-channel, camelot Windows table fix". Additionally, changes were made to the canary render python and the Python environment, including fixing canary render python and consolidating Python to global site-packages, as mentioned in the commit "chore(canary,env): fix canary render python (py -3) + consolidate Python to global site-packages".

1 commit(s) today:

  • 548d6df [main] test(canary): assert audit input PDF byte-equal to pinned feed (R-0003) — Gilad Feldman

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 7 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

The staging branch was the focus of the recent work, with multiple commits made to it. The report viewing experience was enhanced with the addition of "qol features", as stated in the commit message "improve report viewing + qol features". Report UI flow and UX were also improved, as noted in the commit "improve report UI flow + UX", which suggests changes to the user interface and user experience. Additionally, the aesthetics and report navigation were improved, and report naming was also enhanced, as indicated by the respective commit messages. The security and sharing of reports were improved, and profile memory and report editing capabilities were added, with the commit "add profile memory + report editing" detailing these changes. Furthermore, an initial implementation of OAuth was made, as described in the commit "first pass at oauth implementation".

7 commit(s) today:

  • 76b8a02 [staging] improve report viewing + qol features — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →

item.title: auto-zcurve: 1 commit today
item.description:
shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve

Work was done on the 'main' branch in the 'shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve' GitHub repository. The initial commit was made, as stated in the commit message "initial commit", which likely set up the basic structure of the repository. The README file was then updated twice, as indicated by the commit messages "updated readme", suggesting that changes were made to the repository's documentation or description. Later, the validation note was revised and a citation was included, according to the commit message "Revise validation note and include citation", which added or modified a reference in the repository.

1 commit(s) today:

  • 3fce87a [main] Revise validation note and include citation — Shaheed Azaad
  • 2637db4 [main] updated readme — Shaheed Azaad
  • b946cae [main] updated readme — Shaheed Azaad
  • 7141113 [main] initial commit — Shaheed Azaad

View all commits →
